script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
12 minutes of morning light changed my entire day.

[PROBLEM 2-6s]
I used to wake up, grab my phone, and stay inside until noon.
By 2 PM I was useless.

[REFRAME 6-16s]
Morning light tells your brain to start the wake-up process.
Without it, you're running on a dimmed clock all day.

[TIP 16-24s]
Within 60 minutes of waking: go outside.
Even cloudy light is 10x brighter than indoor.
12 minutes is enough.

[CTA 24-30s]
VOLT Sleep gives you 1 action per day. Free. Link in bio.
caption: ** The cheapest energy hack in the world takes 12 minutes. Do you get morning light?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
The free hack that beats every supplement for energy.

[PROBLEM 2-6s]
People spend hundreds on supplements, nootropics, adaptogens.
Most of them do nothing.

[REFRAME 6-16s]
Bright light in the morning anchors your circadian rhythm.
It tells your body when to be alert and when to sleep.
No pill does that.

[TIP 16-22s]
Step outside within the first hour after waking.
10-15 minutes. No sunglasses.

[CTA 22-28s]
Link in bio — free energy profile in 30 seconds.
caption: ** Better than any supplement. Costs nothing. Takes 10 minutes. What's your morning routine?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Why you feel tired even after 8 hours of sleep.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
You slept 8 hours. You should feel great.
But you feel like you slept 4.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
Sleep hours are only half the equation.
Your circadian alignment matters more.
If your light exposure is wrong, 8 hours won't save you.

[TIP 18-24s]
Bright mornings. Dim evenings. That's the reset.

[CTA 24-28s]
I built an app that fixes this. 30 seconds to start. Free.
caption: ** 8 hours of sleep but still tired? The problem isn't quantity. It's timing.
